title: lithospermum mirabile
intro: Lithospermum mirabile, also known as Mirabilis or Blue Vervain, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family, native to Eastern Asia and China. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's roots and leaves are known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Lithospermum mirabile can be prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
